creator: jschauma@netmeister.org
text:
NetBSD's cal(1) has a number of nice features missing in FreeBSD's version, most notably the "-3", "-A after" and "-B before" options, which I find very useful.

Please consider importing these from http://cvsweb.netbsd.org/bsdweb.cgi/src/usr.bin/cal/?only_with_tag=MAIN

How-To-Repeat: cal -3
cal -A 1
cal -B 2
